incompatibleRuntime.title: This system is not supported by the bundled backend
incompatibleRuntime.description: LingAI opened, but the local AionCore backend cannot run on this Linux version. Please upgrade to a supported Linux distribution and restart LingAI.

incompleteInstallation.title: LingAI installation is incomplete
incompleteInstallation.description: This installation is missing required local resources, so AionCore cannot start. Please download and reinstall the latest LingAI. If the issue returns after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined AionCore.
incompleteInstallation.runtimeComponentDescription: This installation is missing required bundled runtime components, so {{resource}} cannot start. Reinstall the latest LingAI package. If it still happens after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined LingAI components.

packageArchitectureMismatch.title: LingAI package architecture mismatch
packageArchitectureMismatch.description: This LingAI package is for {{packageArch}}, but this Mac is {{deviceArch}}. You may have downloaded the wrong package. Please download and install the {{expectedArch}} package.

dataMigration.title: Local data migration failed
dataMigration.description: LingAI opened, but AionCore stopped while initializing local data. Reinstalling LingAI may not fix this. Send a diagnostics report or contact support so the local database migration can be inspected.

localDataRepair.title: Local data repair failed
localDataRepair.description: LingAI opened, but AionCore stopped while repairing local agent cache data. Reinstalling LingAI may not fix this. Send a diagnostics report or contact support so the local database can be inspected.

recoverableDatabaseCorruption.title: Local data is corrupted
recoverableDatabaseCorruption.description: AionUi detected that the local database is corrupted and cannot continue startup. After confirmation, AionUi will back up the old database and create a new local database to continue startup. Historical local data will not be shown for now, and the old database will be kept as a backup.
recoverableDatabaseCorruption.confirmRebuild: Back up old DB and rebuild new DB
recoverableDatabaseCorruption.diagnosticsHint: Sending diagnostics will not modify the local database.
recoverableDatabaseCorruption.rebuildFailed: Failed to back up old DB and rebuild new DB
